about.title: About Me
about.desc: A dedicated Fullstack Developer with 7 years of professional experience, specializing in 5 years of Frontend architecture and 2 years of Fullstack development. Expert at building end-to-end systems by bridging high-performance UIs (React, Nuxt, Vue) with scalable backend logic (Node.js, SQL Server, MongoDB). Focused on delivering pixel-perfect designs, optimizing state management, and streamlining enterprise workflows.
